void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREMITTANCECONFIRM" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFASTIN" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTCANCEL" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3/BakongIncomingTransaction/Input" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTREV" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FtInterfaceWar3" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPI" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCM" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTAPIREV" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns13:BakongIncomingTransaction> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <activityName> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </activityName> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCMType> <ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(($document_Input1/khqrin/Amount)>=('50000') and ($document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy)=('USD'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'USD1700700030001'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(($document_Input1/khqrin/Amount)>=('200000000') and ($document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy)=('KHR'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'KHR1700700030001'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITACCTNO> <ns7:DEBITCURRENCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/CurrenCy"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITCURRENCY> <ns7:DEBITAMOUNT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DEBITAMOUNT> <ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CREDITACCTNO> <ns7:gCPBFTRCVANS> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:CPBFTRCVANS> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CPBFTRCVANS> </ns7:gCPBFTRCVANS> <ns7:INITBANK> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/khqrin/TransId"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:INITBANK> <ns7:DBRTNAME> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/frombank,'0','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:DBRTNAME> <ns7:RECIEVEBANK> <xsl:value-of select="'CPBPKHPPXXX'"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:RECIEVEBANK> <ns7:CDRTNAME> <xsl:value-of select="normalize-space($document_Input1/khqrin/CreditName)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CDRTNAME> <ns7:gCPBFTREMARK> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:CPBFTREMARK> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:CPBFTREMARK> </ns7:gCPBFTREMARK> <ns7:FASTPAYID> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:FASTPAYID> <ns7:FASTMSGID> <xsl:value-of select="concat('KHQR_',$document_Input1/khqrin/bakongid)"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:FASTMSGID> <ns7:gLTXNNARRDR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/Remark,'0','60')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:LTXNNARRDR> </ns7:gLTXNNARRDR> <ns7:gLTXNNARRCR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns7:LTXNNARRCR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_Input1/khqrin/Remark,'0','60')"></xsl:value-of> </ns7:LTXNNARRCR> </ns7:gLTXNNARRCR> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGINCMType> </ns13:BakongIncomingTransaction> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="khqrin">
<xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Amount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnFee" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="FromAccount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ToAccount" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Remark" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TransId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CurrenCy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="bakongid" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="frombank" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CreditName" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
